Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default (Calendared In Dept. 302 In Error. Motion Is Set In Dept. 501 As Indicated On The Papers.)
Off Calendar Sep-20-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Nancy Conway, Esq. 415-241-1140 for Plaintiff. (Appears late after the case is called and Order is signed.
Tudor Jones, Esq. 925-222-3400 of WSHB for Defendant ANNE KIHAGI, RENKA PROP, LLC.


RULING - The matter is Discussed. There is no Appearance by Contesting party when the case is called. Counsel for Plaintiff appears late after the Court adopts the tentative ruling is signed. Counsel is allowed to argue briefly. After arguments, the Court still adopts the tentative ruling and the order stands. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT ANNE KIHAGI, RENKA PROP, LLC's Motion To Set Aside Default.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Defendants Anne Kihagi and Renka Prop., LLC's motion to set aside default is granted under CCP 473(b). California's strong public policy favors deciding cases on their merits. (Rappleyea v. Campbell (1994) 8 Cal.4th 975, 980.) Defendants' alternate grounds need not be reached.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
